sanskrit: ततः स विस्मयाविष्टो हृष्टरोमा धनञ्जयः। प्रणम्य शिरसा देवं कृताञ्जलिरभाषत॥
transliteration: tataḥ sa vismayāviṣṭo hṛṣṭa-romā dhanañjayaḥ | praṇamya śirasā devaṃ kṛtāñjalir abhāṣata ||
literal_meaning: Then, filled with wonder, hair bristling with joy, Arjuna bowed his head to the God, joined palms, and spoke.
contextual_meaning: Awe dissolves habitual self-concept and relational frames, precipitating a peak mystical experience marked by reverence, surrender, and a shift from peer-to-peer to devotee–divine relating.
psychological_state: Self-transcendent awe; temporary suspension of default-mode network ego narratives; parasympathetic-dominant reverence with sympathetic arousal peaks (piloerection).
trigger_scenario: A seasoned therapist sees a client’s lifelong trauma pattern mirrored perfectly in a single sand-tray scene and, for a moment, viscerally senses an intelligence vaster than theory; breath catches, hair stands, and the chair feels like an altar.
anchor_text: Let awe crack your ego open so reverence can guide your next word.
